title: Mechanised cork extraction method
author: Rodriguez García, Aida
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The innovation aimed to improve cork extraction efficiency through mechanization and modernization, introducing electrical machinery and enhancing safety practices. Results include a mechanical guide for extraction, with future plans to enhance safety awareness, professionalize the sector, and phase out manual methods.
steps_raw: The innovation aimed to improve cork extraction efficiency through mechanization and modernization, introducing electrical machinery and enhancing safety practices. Results include a mechanical guide for extraction, with future plans to enhance safety awareness, professionalize the sector, and phase out manual methods.
